errors.AUTH_FAILURE: Authentication failed. Check your username and password in sync settings.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Sync blocked (403). Your server may be blocking the request.
errors.LOCKED: Sync is locked by another device. Try again in a moment.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.PASSPHRASE_REQUIRED: Enter your sync passphrase to continue.
errors.KEY_MISMATCH: Wrong sync passphrase. It must exactly match the passphrase used on your other devices.
errors.VERIFIER_UNSUPPORTED: Your GLANCEvault server needs to be updated to support this app version (key verification).
errors.ACCOUNT_ID_REQUIRED: GLANCEvault is missing an account ID. Re-enter your GLANCEvault details (URL, device token, and account ID) in Cloud Sync settings.
errors.APP_ID_MISMATCH: This sync data belongs to a different app.
errors.SCHEMA_FORWARD_INCOMPATIBLE: This sync data is from a newer app version. Please update the app.
errors.passphraseNeeded: Enter your sync passphrase above to enable GLANCEvault.
errors.vaultUnreachable: Couldn't reach GLANCEvault. Check the vault URL and device token. ({{detail}})

vaultUrl.httpRejected: Insecure connection. Use https:// for a vault on the public internet. Plain http:// is only allowed on a trusted local network (localhost or a LAN address).
vaultUrl.insecureLanWarning: Unencrypted connection: only use on a trusted network.

form.webdavToggleHint: Sync to any WebDAV server (Nextcloud, ownCloud, etc.). Turn this off to keep your connection details but stop syncing on this device, for example when moving fully to GLANCEvault.
form.syncFolderHint: Path on your WebDAV server where sync files are stored.
form.migrationBody: Your sync file is at the old location. You can move it for cleaner organization, and sync will continue to work either way.
form.migrationInstruction: After moving the file, update your Sync folder setting above to
form.encryptionExplainer: Your data is encrypted on-device before upload. The server never sees your plaintext. Use a sync passphrase, not your WebDAV password.
form.encryptionAlreadyConfigured: Encryption is already configured. Leave the passphrase field blank to keep your existing key, or enter it again to re-authenticate on this device.
form.storePassphraseBody: This passphrase cannot be recovered. You will need it to set up sync on new devices. Store it in a password manager.
form.vaultExperimentalWarning: Experimental. Requires a self-hosted GLANCEvault server. Not recommended for most users.
form.vaultToggleHint: Row-grained database sync. Runs alongside your existing WebDAV sync. Your WebDAV data is never modified. Uses the same encryption passphrase as above.
form.vaultReloadHint: Saving a GLANCEvault change reloads the app so the sync engines reconstruct.
form.vaultNeedsEncryption: GLANCEvault is always end-to-end encrypted. Turn on "{{encryption}}" above and set your sync passphrase to enable it.
form.vaultNeedsPassphrase: Enter your sync passphrase in the encryption section above to enable GLANCEvault on this device.
form.vaultUnreachableSimple: Could not reach the vault at this URL.
form.vaultSkipped_one: {{count}} item couldn't be read (skipped). This usually means a different sync passphrase was used on another device.
form.vaultSkipped_other: {{count}} items couldn't be read (skipped). This usually means a different sync passphrase was used on another device.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: The app ran into an unexpected error. Your data is safe in local storage.

settings.title: Settings
settings.timezoneMismatchHint: Task times may appear offset on this device. Update your home timezone below, or re-enable automatic timezone on your device.
settings.timelineViewHint: Default view for the Timeline tab
settings.endOfDayHint: Extends the spine to this time so you can drag items there
settings.homeTimezoneHint: Used to detect when your device is in a different timezone.
settings.globalShortcutsHint: Open the quick-add popup from anywhere on your Mac.
settings.globalShortcutsMainWindowHint: Show the main app window from anywhere on your Mac.
settings.showDailyContent: Show daily tips & quotes in header
settings.cloudSyncDesc: Sync all your data (tasks, inbox, routines, settings) as a JSON file to your cloud storage.
settings.syncCalendarCreds: Sync calendar credentials across my devices
settings.syncCalendarCredsNeedsEncryption: Takes effect once sync encryption is on. Until then, credentials stay on this device.
settings.importIcsDesc: Import events from an iCal (.ics) file
settings.multiUserModeHint: Tag chores with specific household members
settings.multiUserRequiresSync: Requires cloud sync. Set up GLANCEvault or WebDAV sync first.
settings.obsidianSyncFailed: Sync failed. Check console for details
settings.automationIntentsDesc: Let Tasker and other automation apps create, complete, open, and query tasks by sending Android intents.
settings.automationIntentsWarning: Off by default. When on, any app installed on this device can create, complete, and read your tasks, and receive task data (titles and times) via broadcasts.
settings.viewDefaultDesc: Default view for the Timeline tab
settings.homeTimezoneDesc: Used to detect when your device is in a different timezone.
settings.glanceDefaultDesc: Starting page of the GLANCE habits/goals carousel
settings.exportBackupDesc: Download all tasks and settings as JSON
settings.restoreBackupDesc: Load data from a backup file
settings.aiApiKeyHint: Stored in browser localStorage. Keep your device secure.
settings.aiByoApiKey: BYO API key. All calls go directly from your browser to your provider.
settings.obsidianDesc: Import tasks and sync daily notes with your Obsidian vault.
settings.icloudIntentsDesc: Share task intents with other GLANCE apps through iCloud Drive. Files sync automatically across your Apple devices.

modal.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
modal.confirmDeleteRecurringMessage: How would you like to delete this recurring task?
modal.confirmDeleteRecurringNote: Note: Recurring tasks are permanently deleted and cannot be restored from the recycle bin.
modal.emptyBinMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all {{count}} task{{plural}} in the recycle bin? This action cannot be undone.
modal.backupRestoreDescription: Export your data to a file or restore from a previous backup.
modal.exportBackupHint: Download all tasks and settings as JSON
modal.restoreBackupHint: Load data from a backup file

onboarding.welcomeTitle: Welcome to your minimalist day planner
onboarding.welcomeLocal: 100% local by default: no accounts, no servers, no tracking.
onboarding.welcomeTour: Let’s take a quick tour of the key features.
onboarding.glanceSectionDesc: your smart agenda with overdue tasks and today’s schedule
onboarding.inboxSectionDesc: capture tasks to organize later, drag them to the timeline when ready
onboarding.timelineSectionDesc: your day’s schedule, click or use the + button to add tasks
onboarding.interactingClickTimeline: Click on the timeline to add a task at that time
onboarding.interactingClickDateHeader: Click on the date header to add an all-day task
onboarding.interactingDragFromInbox: Drag tasks from Inbox to timeline to schedule them
onboarding.interactingDragResize: Drag the bottom edge of a task to resize its duration
onboarding.interactingRepeat: Set tasks to repeat daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly
onboarding.interactingEdit: Double-click a task title to edit it or add tags
onboarding.interactingNotes: Expand a task to add notes and subtasks for extra detail
onboarding.interactingDailyNotes: Click on a date header to write daily notes
onboarding.interactingFocusMode: Use Focus Mode for distraction-free deep work with a Pomodoro timer
onboarding.spotlightDesc: Press Ctrl+K to instantly search all your tasks, jump to any date, or find tasks by tag.
onboarding.weeklyReviewDesc: Click the chart button on the side panel to review your week: see completion stats, reflect on wins, and plan ahead.
onboarding.shortcutHint: Press ? at any time to see all available shortcuts.
onboarding.cloudSyncDesc: sync your data across devices via WebDAV
onboarding.dataStorageHint: Your data is stored locally in your browser. Use backup or cloud sync to transfer between devices.
onboarding.makeItYoursDesc: Optional features you can enable anytime in Settings:
onboarding.routinesFeatureDesc: daily task templates for each day of the week
onboarding.habitsFeatureDesc: track daily habits with visual progress rings and history
onboarding.aiFeaturesDesc: voice input, morning briefings, and smart task parsing (BYO API key)
onboarding.mobileTimelineSwipeRight: Swipe a task right to move it to inbox
onboarding.mobileTimelineSwipeLeft: Swipe a task left to edit it
onboarding.mobileTimelineLongPress: Long-press and drag to reschedule a task
onboarding.mobileTimelineExpand: Expand tasks to add notes and subtasks
onboarding.mobileTimelineDailyNotes: Tap on a date to write daily notes
onboarding.mobileInboxSwipeRight: Swipe a task right to schedule it
onboarding.mobileInboxSwipeLeft: Swipe a task left to edit it
onboarding.mobileInboxAdd: Tap the + button to add a new inbox task
onboarding.mobileInboxFilter: Use the priority filter to focus on what matters
onboarding.mobileSettingsCloud: Set up cloud sync between devices

habit.noHabitsHint: Add a habit to start tracking
habit.habitDoMoreHint: Track progress toward a daily goal
habit.habitLimitHint: Track consumption against a daily ceiling
habit.trackStepsHint: Pulls from Health Connect, no manual tapping
habit.trackSleepHint: Pulls from Health Connect, no manual tapping
habit.addHabitHint: Add a habit to start tracking

focus.title: Focus Mode
focus.enableDnd: Enable Do Not Disturb during focus?
focus.enableDoNotDisturb: Enable Do Not Disturb during session?

voice.title: Voice Input
voice.recording: Recording... release Space or tap to stop
voice.holdToRecord: Hold Space or tap to record

spotlight.typeToSearch: Type to search across all tasks...

weeklyReview.title: Weekly Review
weeklyReview.noTasksPast7Days: No tasks were scheduled in the past 7 days
weeklyReview.clickForAiInsights: Click here to see AI insights

frames.title: GTD Frames
frames.noFramesDesc: Frames are time blocks on your calendar. Schedule tasks into them yourself, or let Smart Schedule place them for you. Create your first frame to get started.
frames.noSlotLargeEnough: No slot large enough for a {{minutes}} min task

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export your data to a file or restore from a previous backup.
backup.exportHint: Download all tasks and settings as JSON
backup.restoreHint: Load data from a backup file

app.noFocusLast7: No focus sessions in the last 7 days.
app.mergeBothHint: Combine local and server data, keeping all tasks
app.useServerDataHint: Replace local data with what's on the server
app.useLocalDataHint: Upload current data to the server, replacing what's there
app.gettingStartedChecklistHint: Show the guided checklist in the sidebar
app.clickForAiBriefing: Click here to see AI briefing

goals.dropToReassign: Drop on a goal to reassign
goals.noAreasYet: No areas yet. Add one to group your goals (e.g. "Money/Finance", "App Development").
goals.deleteAreaConfirm: Delete this area? Its goals become No Defined Area.
goals.startAfterTarget: Start date is after the target date.
goals.noGoalsInRange: No goals fall within this range.
goals.goalsOutsideRange_one: {{count}} goal outside this range (ended before the current month or starts beyond the window).
goals.goalsOutsideRange_other: {{count}} goals outside this range (ended before the current month or start beyond the window).
